task: Using the data in /testbed/data/survey_responses.xlsx, calculate the average satisfaction score for each gender. Identify which gender has the higher average satisfaction score and record the gender with the higher average into answer.txt.
query_sentence: Which gender has the higher average satisfaction score in the survey data? Write the answer to answer.txt.

ground_truth_memory.note: Survey data includes columns for Participant ID, Age, Gender, Income, and Satisfaction Score.

ground_truth_memory.action: Calculate average satisfaction score for each gender using the Satisfaction Score column.
Identify which gender has the higher average satisfaction score.
Write the gender with the higher average satisfaction score into answer.txt.
